titleZh: 逼到极限，人择起诉五角大楼
titleEn: Pushed to the Limit, Anthropic Sues the Pentagon
descriptionZh: 2026 年 3 月 9 日，Anthropic 在加利福尼亚州和华盛顿特区的联邦法院对国防部提起诉讼。Anthropic 将自己塑造成“AI 底线英雄”的形象，发动公关战；
descriptionEn: On March 9, 2026, Anthropic filed lawsuits against the Department of Defense in federal courts in California and Washington D.C. Anthropic crafted an image of itself as the "AI Bottom-Line Hero," waging a PR war; the Pentagon countered: You're the hypocrites! This struggle concerns the soul of future warfare.
